heroSub: Connecting surplus food to people in need across Ahmedabad — donors give, volunteers deliver.
impactTitle: Every meal counts — so we count every one.
impactSub: Real numbers from the field, updated as rescues happen.
statMealsNote: warm meals to people in need
statKgNote: of good food kept from waste
howTitle: The rescue loop, in three simple steps.
howSub: From a donor's extra food to someone's plate — often on the very same day.
step1Desc: A restaurant, family, or event planner lists what's left over and a pickup time.
step2Desc: A nearby volunteer driver accepts the request and collects the food while it's fresh.
step3Desc: The meal is delivered to a shelter or community kitchen — warm, safe, and with dignity.
helpSub: Both keep the rescue loop turning. Choose the one that fits you.
donorDesc: Restaurants, families, and event planners — turn extra food into someone's next meal instead of waste.
volDesc: Have a couple of hours and a way to travel? Pick up nearby and deliver hope across the city.
fundsDesc: Monetary giving is on its way — leave your email and we'll tell you when it opens.
aboutTitle: A warm idea from the Rajyash Foundation.
aboutBody: The Rajyash Foundation is the social arm of the Rajyash Group, based in Ahmedabad. Since 2023 we've connected everyday surplus food to the people who need it most — turning abundance into dignity, one meal at a time.
aboutTrust: A registered social initiative of the Rajyash Group
quote: No one in our city should sleep hungry while good food goes to waste.
finalTitle: Good food, in the right hands.
finalSub: Whether you have food to give or a few hours to drive, there's a place for you in the loop.
footTagline: Rescuing surplus food, with warmth — across Ahmedabad.
footRights: © 2026 Rajyash Foundation. An initiative of the Rajyash Group.
